entries.answer:
🕐 Otega Restaurant is open *24 hours a day, 7 days a week* — including public holidays!

We never close, so you can always count on us for a hot meal. 🍽️

📍 *Otega Wuse 2 (Main Branch)*
Glovis Mall, 176 Aminu Kano Crescent, beside H-Medix, Wuse 2, Abuja.

📞 07039427479 | 09055000161

Parking is available in front of the mall (arrive early — it fills up fast).

📍 *Otega Kubwa Branch*
Gado Nasko Road, beside Access Bank, Phase 4, Kubwa, Abuja.

📞 07039427479 | 09055000161

Open 24/7.

📍 *Otega Lugbe Branch*
Novare Gateway Mall, Airport Road, Lugbe, Abuja.

📞 07039427479 | 09055000161

Open 24/7.

📍 *Otega Restaurant — 3 Locations in Abuja*

1️⃣ *Wuse 2 (Main):* Glovis Mall, 176 Aminu Kano Crescent, beside H-Medix
2️⃣ *Kubwa:* Gado Nasko Road, beside Access Bank, Phase 4
3️⃣ *Lugbe:* Novare Gateway Mall, Airport Road

All branches are open *24/7*. Which one is closest to you?

🍽️ *Otega Menu Highlights*

*Rice Dishes*
Asun Fried Rice — ₦2,000–2,500
Native Rice — ₦1,500
Tega Special Rice — ₦2,000
Gizzard & Plantain Rice — ₦2,000
White Rice in Leaves — ₦800
Chicken Rice — ₦2,500
Jollof Spaghetti — ₦2,000

*Soups & Swallows*
Egusi Soup — ₦1,500
Ogbono Soup — ₦1,500
Banga Soup — ₦1,000 (with fish ₦5,000)
Ewedu/Gbegiri — ₦1,500
Pounded Yam — ₦800
Amala — ₦500
Starch — ₦500

*Proteins*
Goat Meat — ₦1,500
Assorted — ₦2,000
Titus Fish — ₦1,500–2,000
Croaker Fish — ₦3,500
Chicken — ₦2,500
Chicken Breast — ₦3,000
Turkey XL — ₦5,000
Beef — ₦1,000

*Drinks*
Fresh Melon Juice — ₦3,000

Most meals are under ₦5,000. We use fresh, locally-sourced ingredients. 🌿

🔥 *Asun Fried Rice* is our most popular dish! Smoky spiced goat meat tossed through fragrant fried rice.

Price: ₦2,000–2,500

Our customers say it's a must-try. It's best enjoyed spicy — just let us know your heat preference when ordering!

💰 *Otega is famous for affordable fine dining!*

Most meals start from ₦500–₦1,500 and a full meal with protein and drink is typically *under ₦5,000*.

No hidden charges — what you see on the menu is what you pay. 👌

🛵 *Otega delivery is available 24/7!*

Order through:
• *Chowdeck:* chowdeck.com (search Otega Restaurant)
• *Glovo:* glovoapp.com (search Otega)

You can also call us directly:
📞 07039427479 | 09055000161

Which branch do you want to order from?

📞 *Otega Restaurant Contact*

07039427479
09055000161

Both lines are active *24/7* for bookings, reservations, and delivery enquiries.

🚗 *Parking at Otega*

• *Wuse 2:* Parking in front of Glovis Mall — arrives early, it fills up fast.
• *Kubwa:* Street parking available on Gado Nasko Road.
• *Lugbe:* Parking available at Novare Gateway Mall.

If you can't find a spot, nearby street parking is usually available.

✨ *Otega's vibe is modern, warm, and Instagrammable!*

We designed our space to feel like fine dining without the fine-dining price tag. There's a beautiful photo spot at the back that our customers love.

Pro tip: Come early on weekends to beat the crowd and get the best angles! 📸

💕 *Otega is great for casual dates!*

The ambience is modern and aesthetically pleasing — perfect for a relaxed dinner with someone special.

For a more private experience, we recommend coming after 8pm on weekdays when it's less busy.

Would you like to make a reservation? 🍽️

🎉 *Otega welcomes groups and events!*

We regularly host birthday celebrations, office hangouts, and group dinners.

For large groups (10+), we recommend calling ahead so we can prepare:
📞 07039427479 | 09055000161

Or I can help you make a reservation right now — just say *reserve*!

🥗 *Dietary Information*

We serve a wide range of Nigerian dishes with fresh, local ingredients.

• Most soups and swallows are naturally gluten-friendly
• Vegetarian options are available (soups without meat, rice dishes)
• For severe allergies, please call us directly so the kitchen can assist:
📞 07039427479

🍽️ I can help you reserve a table at Otega! We have 3 branches — Wuse 2, Kubwa, and Lugbe.

Just say *reserve* and I'll walk you through it, or call us directly:
📞 07039427479 | 09055000161
👤 No problem — I'll connect you with our team right away. Tell me briefly what you need help with and which branch this is about.
